title: Manage Scheduled Tasks on Mittwald
description: Review and manage cronjobs on Mittwald hosting.
prompt: I want to review all the scheduled tasks we have running. Can you list all cronjobs, show me the execution history of the main cleanup job, and trigger it manually so I can verify it works correctly? Use the available Mittwald MCP tools to complete this - discover any needed information yourself and make reasonable choices for parameters I didn't specify. Do not ask me questions - just use the tools to get it done.
